title: What's in the proposed deal that could end the US-Iran conflict?
snippet: CNN provides a comprehensive explainer on the proposed U.S.-Iran deal, covering the Strait of Hormuz provisions, nuclear commitments, Lebanon-related clauses, and the overall framework for ending the conflict.
tag_reason: 신규 — 미-이란 합의안의 호르무즈·핵·레바논 조항 등 전체 내용을 종합적으로 설명한 CNN 해설 기사
